name: @arves/assistant
description: ARVES Assistant (JARVIS phase 1, stages 1-3) — the assistant memory core (multi-source one-truth, durable decisions, restart-surviving memory), the governed think→act pipeline (certified skills with cert re-run at registration + RCR-016 bind, a pluggable reasoner slot shipping ONLY a deterministic NOT-AI stub, policy-as-truth guardrails with separate approval truths), deterministic sub-agents over one shared truth base (in-body product-level attribution, first-committed-wins conflict resolution), and why() decision-path reconstruction from committed truths. Built on the frozen ARVES Runtime v1.0. G1 preview — the four-condition GA gate is honestly UNMET.

platform.consumes: ARVES Runtime v1.0 (tag runtime-v1.0; TS SDK codec + Kernel Bridge line protocol incl. RCR-011 id=, RCR-014 shard=, RCR-015 --wal-dir, RCR-016 bind) — FROZEN
proves: A2 multi-source one-truth with evidence sets
A3 certified skills (forged flags refused; bind->invoke->committed effect truth)
A4 pluggable reasoner slot (deterministic stub; proposals committed as truth)
A5 sub-agents over one shared truth base (in-body attribution; first-committed-wins; loser references winner)
A6 guardrails (policy-as-truth; separate approval truths; compliance events)
A7 why() decision-path reconstruction (byte-identical across restarts)

scripts.test: node assistant.test.mjs && node skills.test.mjs && node agents.test.mjs
